description: CompositionWhite sneakers made with synthetic uppers, fabric lining and phylon sole shoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese white sneakers from fila are great for cross training purposes and urban wear. The mesh and PU uppers give greater durability and support and keep the feet dry for long. The carbon rubber outsole provides better grip with the aggressive grooves ethed onto it, while the moulded EVA midsole gives a great cushioned ride.
